hook.text: If you ever start to wonder why all the rain and all the thunder follows her around You better cut that girl loose Oh yeah
hook.target_audience_raw: women experiencing unexplained pain, possibly endometriosis patients or those suspecting

main_claim.text: Painful intercourse is one of the most common symptoms of endometriosis and often dismissed by providers.

supporting_explanation.summary: The caption emphasizes that this symptom is frequently ignored, and that being specific about its impact on daily life makes it harder to dismiss.

funnel_rationale: focuses on awareness of a common but dismissed symptom, broad education without direct call to action

secondary_raw: dismissal of symptoms by healthcare providers
